other_observers: Van Truan on November 7th.; I found it on November 4th.
duration: 30 minutes off and on over the 3 days
specific_location: Middle of Pueblo Reservoir on Nov 4th Off Sailboard launching area at Pueblo Reservoir on Nov 6th Off Northeast part of Pueblo Reservoir on Nov 7th (photo taken on this date)
description: The bird had a thin up-turned bill, white face, gray neck, and was a small loon. The shape of the bird was typical for a Red-throated Loon. See photos.Behaviors: Swimming and diving in the water.Call: nonePlumage: basic plumage
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
